scope.notes: T11 implemented share/save Web pages only. Runtime browser clicks, real screenshots, live API transcript, and final product PASS remain T13-T16 scope.

commands.note: pnpm emitted a sandbox filter warning, then executed @auracue/web smoke routes and exited 0.

commands.evidence: PowerShell exit check parsed T11.json and verified handoff, command log, page contract, share transcript, and T11-prefixed verification logs exist.

evidence.summary: Verified /share/[id] and /saved/[id] no longer use placeholders, required copy/actions exist, render/save/share client calls are wired, native-share unavailable falls back, clipboard/download mocks are represented, render failure exposes fallback plus Generate Again, and forbidden paywall copy is absent.
Documents T11 action-to-API mapping for load/render, copy, download, native share/fallback, and save-to-collection.
TypeScript completed with no emit and no errors.
Smoke route suite recognizes SharePageFlow and SavedPageFlow for the T11 routes.

repairRecord.issue: Initial share-save page test failed because the static assertion expected an inline channel property for web_share while the implementation computes the channel from native-share availability.
repairRecord.repair: Updated the assertion to verify the web_share literal and reran the required page test successfully.

rerunResumeState.notes: Use pnpm.cmd on this Windows PowerShell surface. T11 did not start a live dev server, click a browser, or prove DB readback; T13/T14/T12 own those later gates.

exitCondition: T13/T14 can cover the share/save stage after activation with Copy Link, Share fallback/native share, Save Image/download recording, Save to AuraCue, and Saved Back Home behavior.
